abilities.name: Amateur Astrologer
abilities.text: Once per turn. After failing a duel, this model may write the suit and value of its card into your star chart.

abilities.name: Demise (Expendable)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, either draw a card or make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Evasive
abilities.text: This model may ignore (X) effects which did not target it.

actions.name: Dynamite Punch
actions.effects: Enemy models within (melee)2" of the target are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Big Boom
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the (melee) of this action by 1".

actions.name: Horrible Luck
actions.effects: Move the target its Sp away from this model. Deal 1 damage to it for every piece of terrain it comes into base contact with. If it is dealt falling damage during this action, increase that damage by 1.

triggers.name: Mangled Valuables
triggers.text: Remove one marker the target moved through.

triggers.name: Clumsy Assistance
triggers.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. Draw two cards, then discard a random card.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.effects: Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.
